name: GOLFTEC Memorial City
about: GOLFTEC Memorial City is a golf training facility that specializes in data-driven instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. Their coaching services are designed to help golfers of all skill levels improve their swing and game plan through personalized lessons and practice memberships. The facility operates on a lesson and club fitting model, offering a structured approach to improvement with access to their training bays and certified PGA coaches.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors provides detailed swing data and feedback
PGA-certified coaches deliver personalized lesson plans and game strategies for lasting improvement
Structured practice memberships with guided training plans for efficient skill development

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services available on-site.
No mention of alcohol services available on-site. BYOB not indicated.

simulator_hardware.notes: Specific launch monitor models are not mentioned, but the technology includes launch monitors and high-speed cameras.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and practice, but students are welcome to bring their own clubs if they prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and drink services or policies regarding outside food and drinks, so it's best to contact the location directly for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a training facility focused on lessons and practice, not on-course play, the time to complete an 18-hole simulation is not specified.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs and lessons specifically designed for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and improve their skills.
